These module imports were intentionally deferred to increase startup time of the pip CLI. The patch changes self-update functionality to run before wheels are installed to prevent newly-installed modules from being imported shortly after the installation of a wheel package. Users should still review package contents prior to installation.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00138, "percentile": 0.03527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jp4c-xjxw-mgf9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T22:05:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jp4c-xjxw-mgf9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jp4c-xjxw-mgf9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-6357"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-27T15:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-04-27T15:30:52Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6357", "https://github.com/pypa/pip/pull/13923", "https://ichard26.github.io/blog/2026/04/whats-new-in-pip-26.1/#security-fixes", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/04/27/7", "https://github.com/pypa/pip/commit/b369bfc96cc524e00c267e1693290e6599c36bad", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jp4c-xjxw-mgf9"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pypa/pip", "summary": "pip Vulnerable to Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T22:05:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jp4c-xjxw-mgf9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "26.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pip"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
